name: albaik-mobile-automation
description: Albaik Mobile App BDD Automation Framework

scripts.test:web:chrome:dev: set TEST_PLATFORM=web&&set BROWSER=chrome&&set ENV=dev&&wdio run wdio.config.ts
scripts.test:web:chrome:staging: set TEST_PLATFORM=web&&set BROWSER=chrome&&set ENV=staging&&wdio run wdio.config.ts
scripts.test:web:chrome:prod: set TEST_PLATFORM=web&&set BROWSER=chrome&&set ENV=prod&&wdio run wdio.config.ts
scripts.test:web:firefox:dev: set TEST_PLATFORM=web&&set BROWSER=firefox&&set ENV=dev&&wdio run wdio.config.ts
scripts.test:web:firefox:staging: set TEST_PLATFORM=web&&set BROWSER=firefox&&set ENV=staging&&wdio run wdio.config.ts
scripts.test:web:firefox:prod: set TEST_PLATFORM=web&&set BROWSER=firefox&&set ENV=prod&&wdio run wdio.config.ts
scripts.test:web:edge:dev: set TEST_PLATFORM=web&&set BROWSER=edge&&set ENV=dev&&wdio run wdio.config.ts
scripts.test:web:edge:staging: set TEST_PLATFORM=web&&set BROWSER=edge&&set ENV=staging&&wdio run wdio.config.ts
scripts.test:web:edge:prod: set TEST_PLATFORM=web&&set BROWSER=edge&&set ENV=prod&&wdio run wdio.config.ts
scripts.allure:report: npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
